# Third-Party Sources

This document lists third-party repositories and resources used
in this dotfiles setup.

All sources here:
- Are not authored by me
- Are used as-is or with minimal modification
- Are managed either automatically by `setup.sh` or manually

## Tmux – Catppuccin Theme

**Type:** tmux theme  
**Target:** `~/.config/tmux`  
**Source:** https://github.com/catppuccin/tmux

### Description
Catppuccin theme for tmux.  
The repository is downloaded as a zip and extracted directly into
the tmux configuration directory.

### Notes
- Theme configuration is handled in `.tmux.conf`

## art-hypr
### Description
find random on the internet and mods



## Mpv Playlistmanager
**Source:** https://github.com/jonniek/mpv-playlistmanager

mpv scripts

## Anime4K

### Description
anime upscaling

### Firefox

Find random mods on the internet (manual setup).

**Notes:**
- Firefox requires manual configuration for mods

**Recommended Extensions:**
- Dark Reader
- Tabliss
